definitions.text: To conclude or resolve (something): To determine (something which was exposed to doubt or question); to resolve conclusively; to set or fix (a time, an order of succession, etc).
examples: She hopes to settle any questions about the plans.

definitions.text: To determine (something which was exposed to doubt or question); to resolve conclusively; to set or fix (a time, an order of succession, etc).
examples: She hopes to settle any questions about the plans.

definitions.text: To conclude, to cause (a dispute) to finish.
A long bench with a high back and arms, often with chest or storage space underneath.
A place made lower than the rest; a wide step or platform lower than some other part.
